axeViolations.help: Links must be distinguishable without relying on color

samples.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  The link has insufficient color contrast of 1.87:1 with the surrounding text. (Minimum contrast is 3:1, link text: #0aa88c, surrounding text: #54688a)
  The link has no styling (such as underline) to distinguish it from the surrounding text

samples.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:

  Target has insufficient space to its closest neighbors. Safe clickable space has a diameter of 10px instead of at least 24px.
